testcase.name: test_multiple_projects_have_usb_h_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_project_header_edit.py:250: in test_multiple_projects_have_usb_h_format self.login_as_planning() backend/tests/test_project_header_edit.py:29: in login_as_planning assert response.status_code == 200, f"Planning login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Planning login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_super_admin_can_patch_project
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_project_header_edit.py:272: in test_super_admin_can_patch_project self.login_as_super_admin() backend/tests/test_project_header_edit.py:41: in login_as_super_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Super admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Super admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
